channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic and OpenAI ignite new competition for frontier AI access
item.description: Leading AI labs are adopting a new approach to controlling their most advanced cyber-capable models while still commercializing them: selective access. ...

item.title: House Democrats threaten to withhold DCCC dues after party's California setback
item.description: The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee faces internal backlash and calls for change after spending $135,000...

item.title: Drone boat rescues U.S. helicopter crew shot down by Iran
item.description: A U.S. Apache helicopter crew downed by Iran was rescued by a drone-boat called Corsair, marking a first-of-its-kind operation...

item.title: Exclusive: Wall Street embraces crypto it once feared
item.description: Traditional financial firms are rapidly adopting crypto, signaling a shift for an industry that once saw digital assets as a threat...
